description: Google Authorized Buyers is Google's platform for programmatic ad buying and real-time bidding. Its buyer-facing APIs let approved buyers manage accounts, RTB configuration, creatives, auction metrics, marketplace deals, and client access.
summary: Google Authorized Buyers exposes three OAuth-protected REST APIs for developer integrations: Ad Exchange Buyer API II on adexchangebuyer.googleapis.com, plus Marketplace API and Real-time Bidding API.
